overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval European town at night. The character traverses a covered stone tunnel, open courtyards with half-timbered buildings, narrow alleys, and ascends a torch-lit cobblestone ramp. The scene features atmospheric lighting from burning torches and windows against a dark blue night sky.

events.description: begins walking through the dark stone archway tunnel
approaching tunnel exit, warm light visible ahead indicating the opening

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the dark stone tunnel toward the lit exit ahead

notable_agents.action: distant figure standing near the tunnel exit ahead

entered.detail: large stone archway forming a covered passage through the building structure
rough hewn stone wall of the tunnel passage
rough hewn stone wall of the tunnel passage
warm yellow light glowing from a window above the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark, enclosed stone tunnel with cobblestone flooring. The character walks forward through the narrow passage flanked by rough stone walls, approaching a distant light at the tunnel exit. A figure stands visible near the exit ahead, and warm light glows from a window above.

events.description: exits covered tunnel into open courtyard with half-timbered architecture
passes close by a guard NPC standing on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking through the courtyard, passing by a guard standing near the wall on the right

notable_agents.action: guard in blue clothing and hat standing against the wall, watching the area

entered.detail: traditional medieval building with exposed dark wooden beams and plaster walls, lit windows
wooden staircase attached to the stone building leading upward
open cobblestone area between buildings with grass patches

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens into a courtyard featuring traditional half-timbered architecture. The character passes a guard standing on the right near wooden stairs attached to a stone building. Warm light glows from multiple windows of the timber-framed house on the left as the character moves through the open cobblestone space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with wooden market stalls

events.description: turns right into narrow passage between stone buildings
passes by a burning torch mounted on the right wall, casting warm light

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow alleyway, passing wooden structures and market stalls on the right

entered.detail: wooden stalls and barriers lining the right side of the narrow street
tight stone walls of the alleyway creating an enclosed corridor
burning torch mounted on the wall providing warm orange light

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a narrow alleyway enclosed by high stone walls. Wooden market stalls and barriers line the right side of the cobblestone path. The area is dimly lit primarily by a burning torch mounted on the right wall, creating dramatic shadows in the confined space.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone ramp ascending with torch braziers

events.description: begins ascending the steep cobblestone ramp, sky becomes fully visible
passes guard holding torch standing on the right side of the ramp

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep cobblestone ramp, following other pedestrians ahead toward the upper level

notable_agents.action: guard holding a burning torch, standing watch near a stone archway entrance
group of pedestrians walking up the ramp ahead of the character

entered.detail: steep upward sloping cobblestone path with irregular stones
low stone wall with crenellations along the left side of the ramp
large burning braziers on stone pillars lighting the ascending path
wooden cart with large wheels and barrels parked on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow alley onto a wide, steep cobblestone ramp ascending into the night. Large burning braziers on pillars illuminate the path, and a stone parapet wall runs along the left side. The character passes a guard with a torch standing near a stone archway, then continues up the ramp following other pedestrians, with wooden carts and the open night sky visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic depths of a stone tunnel into the expansive, torch-lit heights of a medieval town at night. It begins within a dark, enclosed passage of rough stone and cobblestones, moving toward a distant light and a waiting figure at the exit. As the camera emerges from the tunnel, the space opens into a courtyard featuring half-timbered architecture and warm light glowing from windows, passing a guard stationed by wooden stairs. The scene then shifts into a narrow, dimly lit alleyway lined with wooden market stalls and dramatic shadows cast by a single wall-mounted torch before turning toward a wide, ascending cobblestone ramp. Finally, the environment expands under the open night sky as the camera climbs past burning braziers and stone parapets, following pedestrians and carts upward toward the town's higher reaches.
